title: clerodendrum cyrtophyllum var. kwangsiense
intro: Clerodendrum cyrtophyllum var. kwangsiense, also known as the Kwangsi variety of the Clerodendrum cyrtophyllum plant, is a flowering plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to southern China and Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum cyrtophyllum var. kwangsiense include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
